meta.title: The Aaru
meta.description: A thousand-year generation ship, now silent. You wake in a hibernation pod with no memory. Explore the vast, strange vessel and piece together what happened.

properties.name: factionOrigin
properties.description: Which faction built or modified this area or object

properties.name: systemStatus
properties.description: Operational status of a ship system or device

properties.name: dataContent
properties.description: Readable text content stored on a terminal, datapad, or inscription

properties.name: accessLevel
properties.description: Security clearance level required to use or open this (0 = none)

properties.name: automated
properties.description: Whether this entity operates autonomously (robots, systems)
